name: Jenny Realight
alt_names: ジェニー・リアライト
description: Jenny Realight is a Mage of Blue Pegasus, and also the current "Miss Fiore".  Jenny seems to be a popular and elegant young lady, as she won Miss Fiore. She is pale-skinned, and has a top model physical, being thin, and having large busts. Her hair is long, tied and decorated with flower. As a model, she's usually seen with makeup, having eyeliner around the eyes, blush in the cheeks and detached lipstick. Her jewelry consists of dangle earrings, a tiled necklace and bracelets. She wears a sparkly strapless dress, highlighting her bust. Her guild mark is on her left shoulder.
